title: DensityExtractionOptions
description: DensityExtractionOptions: Settings for extraction of Density from a List of IDensityProviders.

AllowFallbackIfNoType.description: If true, and material does not contain a IDensityProvider of the specified type, DensityExtraction falls back to look for other densities. If false and material does not contain the type DensityExtraction exits.

EqualTolerance.description: The ratio tolerance for considering the value of the densities as equal. Density values are deemed equal if (max - min / mean) is smaller than this value, where mean = (max + min)/2, i.e. a tolerance of 0.01 means an allowable difference of 1% normalised to the mean value of found densities. Property has a quantity of type Ratio meassured in [-].

IgnoreZeroValues.description: Ignores densities of 0 if true when computing average or checking for equality.

ZeroTolerance.description: Threshold for density values to be seen as 0.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
